items.name: Claude Opus 4.6
items.hook: First Opus-class model with a 1M-token context window plus 'agent teams' that let multiple Claude Code agents work in parallel — released Feb 5.

items.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
items.hook: New default Sonnet at $3/$15 per MTok hits 79.6% on SWE-bench Verified with 1M-token context — released Feb 17.

items.name: Apple Xcode 26.3 + Claude Agent SDK
items.hook: Xcode ships native Claude Agent SDK integration — subagents, background tasks, plugins, and Preview-based visual verification for iOS/macOS/visionOS.
items.install: Update Xcode to 26.3 → Settings → Accounts → Claude

items.name: Claude Code Security
items.hook: Reasoning-based vulnerability scanner that found 500+ zero-days in production OSS, now in limited preview for Enterprise/Team and OSS maintainers.

items.name: Claude Cowork on Windows
items.hook: Cowork desktop reaches Windows with full feature parity — file access, MCP connectors, plugins — opening Anthropic's autonomous agent to ~70% of desktops.
items.install: Download Claude Desktop for Windows → switch to Cowork mode

items.name: Anthropic acquires Vercept
items.hook: Seattle computer-use startup behind Vy joins Anthropic to advance Claude's desktop automation; Vercept product sunset March 25.

items.name: Claude in PowerPoint expands to Pro
items.hook: Template-aware slide co-author lands on the $20/mo Pro tier — read existing decks, edit with brand-respecting precision, generate full structures from a prompt.

items.name: Anthropic + Infosys partnership
items.hook: Joint Center of Excellence to build Claude-powered agents for telecom, financial services, manufacturing, and software dev in regulated industries.

items.name: Cowork enterprise plugin marketplaces
items.hook: 10 department plugin packs + 12 new MCP connectors (Google Workspace, DocuSign, FactSet, Harvey…) and a 'Customize' admin UI for private internal marketplaces.

items.name: anthropics/financial-services-plugins
items.hook: Anthropic's first official vertical plugin pack — ~7.7K stars, MCP-backed integrations for finserv workflows like equity research and compliance review.

items.name: Fast mode for Claude Opus 4.6
items.hook: Same Opus 4.6 weights, ~2.5× faster output tokens/sec, priced 6× standard — toggle with /fast in Claude Code v2.1.36+.
items.install: Inside Claude Code: /fast (then Tab to toggle)

items.name: Claude for Open Source program
items.hook: Six months of free Claude Max 20x ($1,200 value) for up to 10,000 OSS maintainers of repos with 5K+ stars or 1M+ monthly NPM downloads.

items.name: claude-devtools
items.hook: Visual UI for Claude Code session logs — turn-based context, compaction visualization, subagent execution trees, token-usage observability.

items.name: Claude Code Remote Control
items.hook: Run a local Claude Code session, then drive it from claude.ai/code, iOS, or Android — execution stays on your machine, prompts flow from anywhere.

items.name: Pragmatic Engineer Survey: Claude Code most-loved
items.hook: Survey of ~1,000 devs (Jan 27–Feb 17) crowns Claude Code the #1 most-loved tool at 46%, vs Cursor 19% and Copilot 9%; 95% of devs use AI weekly.

items.name: Anthropic OAuth third-party ban
items.hook: Anthropic clarifies that Free/Pro/Max OAuth tokens cannot be used in third-party tools (incl. its own Agent SDK) — ending the OpenClaw-era subscription resale loophole.

items.name: The Claude C Compiler
items.hook: Nicholas Carlini's parallel-Claude experiment: Opus 4.6 + agent teams produced a dependency-free Rust C compiler that boots Linux on x86/ARM/RISC-V.

items.name: Superpowers (obra)
items.hook: 20+ composable skills enforcing clarify→design→plan→code→verify discipline — exploded to 55K+ stars in Feb after Anthropic accepted it into the official marketplace.

items.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
items.hook: Addy Osmani (Google) drops production-grade engineering skills compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, and Antigravity — ~18K stars in weeks.

items.name: mattpocock/skills
items.hook: Matt Pocock's personal `.claude/skills` directory becomes the most-cloned creator-driven skill collection of the month — ~16.5K stars.

items.name: Anthropic Cybersecurity Skills
items.hook: 754 cybersecurity skills mapped to MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF — riding the Claude Code Security wave to ~5K stars.

items.name: code-review-graph
items.hook: Local knowledge-graph MCP server for Claude Code — claims 6.8× fewer tokens on review tasks via tree-sitter + graph indexing. ~11.7K stars.
items.install: pip install code-review-graph && claude mcp add code-review-graph

items.name: engram
items.hook: Persistent agent memory MCP server in Go + SQLite — tools for store/recall/forget across sessions, riding Feb's memory-layer wave.

items.name: context-mode
items.hook: Claude Code plugin that sandboxes tool output via PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks — claims 98% context-window reduction across 12 platforms.

items.name: Composio agent-orchestrator
items.hook: Parallel coding-agent orchestrator from Composio — coordinates Claude Code subagents on CI fixes and merge-conflict resolution. ~6.4K stars.
